meta.question: Which document contains the top‑level APS requirements imported from DOORS?
meta.finalAnswer:
The document **"TMT-APS DDD"** contains the top-level APS requirements imported from DOORS.

This document (located at: TMT::Project::Work Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment and Phasing System::Systems Engineering::09 Views::TMT-APS-SE::TMT-APS DDD::TMT-APS DDD) has relationships to:
- **"TMT Requirements imported from DOORS"** package - which contains the top-level requirements imported from DOORS
- **"DOORS Requirements Data Base (L0 through L2)"** model - the DOORS requirements database

The document "TMT-APS DDD" serves as the container for APS requirements that were imported from the DOORS system.

events.output: I'll help you find the document containing top-level APS requirements imported from DOORS. Let me explore the model to find this information.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found multiple APS-related elements including documents. Need to explore properties of the document elements to find which one contains requirements imported from DOORS.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("TMT-APS DDD")))
  ?elem rdf:type vocab:document .
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("DOORS"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found DOORS-related packages. Need to find which document contains top-level APS requirements imported from DOORS. Let me search for documents that contain APS requirements imported from DOORS.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?doc vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT-APS%20L3%20Requirements" .
  ?doc rdf:type vocab:document .
  ?doc ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?doc vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT-APS%20L3%20Requirements" .
  ?doc rdf:type vocab:document .
  ?doc vocab:Element_ownedElement ?elem .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?doc vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT-APS%20L3%20Requirements" .
  ?doc rdf:type vocab:document .
  ?doc vocab:Element_owner ?owner .
  ?owner vocab:Element_ownedElement ?elem .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT%20Requirements%20imported%20from%20DOORS" .
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement ?elem .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
}
LIMIT 25
